case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. CLARK, CYNTHIA A.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CLARK, CYNTHIA A. $2,704.72 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,787.72
